compressed_prompt:
craft a quirky resume for Antonia Maj for a coffee co. job; sections, 2 markdown bullets: 
* marketing & sales exp
* customer service & unique skills
response:
# Antonia Maj: Coffee Connoisseur & Quirky Delight
## Brewing Up a Storm in Your Coffee Co.

### Contact Info
* Email: [antonia.maj@email.com](mailto:antonia.maj@email.com)
* Phone: 555-555-5555
* LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/antoniamaj

### Marketing & Sales Experience
* Spearheaded a social media campaign that increased followers by 500% in 3 months, with a focus on Instagram-worthy coffee moments
* Successfully convinced friends and family to try new coffee flavors, resulting in a 100% conversion rate (okay, they just humored me, but still!)

### Customer Service & Unique Skills
* Possesses the ability to craft a mean latte art heart, and can recite the entire script of "Barista: The Movie" from memory
* Can juggle three coffee cups while doing a little tap dance – a skill honed from years of working as a barista at a quirky coffee shop
